tasks.title: OPA/Rego embed: fixed audited evaluator module + deny-overrides effect (TG-95)

scenarios: Operator rules enter the fixed Rego module as data only
A matching deny wins regardless of rule order
Every decision records the bundle version and the full matched-rule list

tasks.title: Rule data model + schema + verdict trinary + param inheritance (TG-96)

scenarios: A rule resolves an action to one of auto approve or deny
An unset rule param inherits from the global-default rule
A below-min-confidence action is clamped to approve
An over-rate-limit action is clamped to approve

tasks.title: Four global modes: exactly-one-active, gated+audited transitions, fail-closed Shadow default (TG-98)

scenarios: Exactly one of the four modes is active
A mode transition is gated and audited to the ledger
An absent persisted mode fails closed to Shadow
The mode is the sole actuation chokepoint that absorbs the retired gate

tasks.title: Identical-pipeline invariant: mode governs only the actuation branch (TG-99)

scenarios: The investigation pipeline is identical across all four modes

tasks.title: Band composition: respect (more-restrictive) and force (override, double-warn) (TG-100)

scenarios: Respect band_mode emits the more-restrictive of verdict and risk band
Force band_mode overrides the risk band and double-warns
A floor-class action is still proposed with rationale in every mode
The conservative template loads the predecessor deny-patterns and governor
Removing the conservative template warns but is not blocked

tasks.title: Per-op-class graduation promote/demote bound to verify-on-auto (TG-102)

scenarios: An op-class promotes to auto after N clean verified runs
An op-class demotes to approve on the first deviation
An auto verdict still runs predict execute verify breaker
A vote from an approve_by member is admitted
A vote from a non-member is rejected

tasks.title: Federated LDAP/OIDC principal resolution behind the identity interface (TG-104)

scenarios: A federated principal resolves through the configured provider

tasks.title: Warn-don't-block guard + audit-every-decision + admin engine toggle (TG-105)

scenarios: A single allow-all policy is permitted behind a red double-confirmation
Every policy decision is appended to the governance ledger
Forcing the engine on in Shadow warns and disabling it in Semi-auto double-warns

tasks.title: policy_decision persistence migration + console policy surface + packet-tracer (TG-106)

scenarios: The policy_decision table is append-only with no runtime UPDATE or DELETE
The console edits rules as data and renders the packet-tracer explanation

tasks.title: Safety-core refactor: absorb MutationGate + TG_MUTATION_ENABLED into the mode chokepoint; re-express INV-09/INV-21 (breaker, /halt, boot preflight, spec/013, lockstep) in mode terms (TG-95 refactor)

scenarios: The mode is the sole actuation chokepoint that absorbs the retired gate
Absorbing the mutation gate is a deliberate audited safety-core refactor
